nasb.text: But as the church is subject to Christ, so also the wives ought to be to their husbands in everything.

esv.text: Now as the church submits to Christ, so also wives should submit in everything to their husbands.

cnv.text: 教會怎樣順服基督，妻子也要照樣凡事順服丈夫。

ccb.text: 教会怎样顺服基督，妻子也要照样凡事顺服丈夫。

csbs.text: 而且教会怎样服从基督，妻子也照样要在一切事上服从丈夫。
